title: OptiPack
description: An optimization and QoL pack, as a baseline for mod makers. Or for vanilla players.
body:
A pack consisting of Quality of life mods and optimization.

As you could expect from the name, this is an optimization oriented mod pack, both for vanilla use and to put a mod pack on top of.
Also consider someaddon's mods, they're pretty good but only on Curseforge.

Why?
As some mod packs get bigger, their FPS and TPS sometimes become abysmal, and putting a lot of optimization mods together every time is a hustle. This mod pack is to help you do that by letting you download and copy its mods and putting your mod pack on top of it.

Personally, I have had this issue way too many times, which is why I made this, hope it helps.


<details>
<summary>Test PC Specs</summary>
Nvidia 4060
AMD Ryzen 7 8700F 8-Core Processor
128 GB DDR5 ram down clocked at 3600MT/s
NVMe SSD, I forgot its read/write speed

Test's will be uploaded as soon as i get the file size low enough, Modrinth allows only 2 MB max.
</details>
